meta.title: CodixIA
meta.description: Gestiona tu negocio en WhatsApp como un equipo. Bandeja compartida, pipeline de ventas, broadcasts, automatizaciones y asistente IA.

hero.title: Gestiona tu negocio en WhatsApp como un equipo
hero.subtitle: Bandeja compartida, pipeline de ventas, campañas masivas, automatizaciones sin código y asistente de IA — todo en una plataforma que tú controlas.

features.title: Todo lo que necesitas para vender por WhatsApp
features.subtitle: Cinco pilares diseñados para equipos de ventas y soporte.

sharedInbox.title: Bandeja compartida
sharedInbox.description: Todos tus chats de WhatsApp en un solo lugar. Asigna conversaciones, añade etiquetas, y trabaja en equipo sin pisar los mensajes de los demás.

pipeline.title: Pipeline de ventas
pipeline.description: Visualiza tus leads en un kanban. Arrastra y suelta entre etapas, personaliza el flujo y nunca pierdas el seguimiento de una oportunidad.

broadcasts.title: Broadcasts
broadcasts.description: Envía campañas masivas segmentadas. Programa mensajes, mide resultados y llega a tus contactos en el momento adecuado.

automations.title: Automatizaciones
automations.description: Crea flujos sin código con triggers y acciones. Desde bienvenidas automáticas hasta seguimientos inteligentes.

aiAssistant.title: Asistente de IA
aiAssistant.description: Responde más rápido con sugerencias inteligentes. El asistente aprende de tu base de conocimiento y redacta respuestas por ti.

howItWorks.title: Empieza en minutos
howItWorks.subtitle: Tres pasos simples para transformar tu comunicación en WhatsApp.

step1.title: Conecta WhatsApp
step1.description: Vincula tu número de WhatsApp Business API en segundos. Sin configuraciones complejas.

step2.title: Invita a tu equipo
step2.description: Añade agentes, asigna roles y empiecen a colaborar en la misma bandeja de entrada.

step3.title: Empieza a vender
step3.description: Gestiona leads, envía campañas y automatiza tu proceso de ventas desde el primer día.

pricing.title: Precios simples y transparentes
pricing.subtitle: Elíge el plan que mejor se adapte a tu equipo. Todos los planes incluyen 14 días de prueba gratuita.

cta.title: ¿Listo para transformar tu comunicación?
cta.subtitle: Auto-hospeda tu CRM y mantén el control total de tus datos. Sin sorpresas, sin límites ocultos.

footer.description: CRM auto-hospedable para WhatsApp. Tu negocio, tus datos, tu control.

featuresPage.title: Funcionalidades
featuresPage.subtitle: Descubre todo lo que CodixIA puede hacer por tu equipo.

sharedInbox.title: Bandeja compartida
sharedInbox.description: Centraliza todas las conversaciones de WhatsApp en un solo lugar. Tu equipo puede ver, asignar y responder mensajes sin conflictos.

pipeline.title: Pipeline de ventas
pipeline.description: Convierte más leads con un pipeline visual. Arrastra y suelta entre etapas, personaliza tu flujo de ventas y haz seguimiento de cada oportunidad.

broadcasts.title: Broadcasts
broadcasts.description: Llega a cientos de contactos con un solo clic. Segmenta tu audiencia, programa campañas y mide el rendimiento.

automations.title: Automatizaciones
automations.description: Crea flujos de trabajo automatizados sin escribir una sola línea de código. Desde mensajes de bienvenida hasta seguimientos complejos.

aiAssistant.title: Asistente de IA
aiAssistant.description: Responde más rápido y con mayor precisión. El asistente de IA aprende de tu base de conocimiento y sugiere respuestas contextuales.

pricingPage.title: Precios
pricingPage.subtitle: Planes flexibles para equipos de todos los tamaños.

mission.title: Nuestra misión
mission.description: Creemos que los negocios merecen tener control total sobre sus datos y su comunicación. CodixIA nace para ofrecer una alternativa auto-hospedable a los CRM cerrados, combinando potencia empresarial con privacidad y transparencia.

why.title: Por qué auto-hospedar
why.description: Tus datos de clientes son demasiado valiosos para dejarlos en manos de terceros. CodixIA se instala en tu propio servidor, dándote control absoluto sobre quién accede a qué, sin límites artificiales ni costes ocultos.

stack.title: Tecnología
stack.description: Construido con Next.js, Supabase y TypeScript. Diseñado para ser rápido, seguro y fácil de desplegar.

LoginPage.descAccept: Inicia sesión y te llevaremos a la invitación.

roles.viewerHint: Solo lectura en toda la app
roles.ownerHint: Control total de cuenta y facturación

Sidebar.title: CodixIA
Sidebar.unreadConversations: {count} {count, plural, =1 {conversación sin leer} other {conversaciones sin leer}}
Sidebar.unreadNotifications: {count} {count, plural, =1 {notificación sin leer} other {notificaciones sin leer}}

page.title: Dashboard
page.description: Analíticas en vivo de conversaciones, contactos, ofertas, broadcasts y automatizaciones.

activityFeed.title: Actividad reciente
activityFeed.noActivityHint: La actividad de mensajes, ofertas, broadcasts y automatizaciones aparecerá aquí.

conversationsChart.title: Conversaciones en el tiempo
conversationsChart.description: Volumen diario de mensajes por dirección
conversationsChart.noActivity: Sin actividad de mensajes en este rango
conversationsChart.noActivityHint: Envía o recibe mensajes para empezar a poblar este gráfico.

pipelineDonut.title: Valor del pipeline
pipelineDonut.noOpenDealsHint: Crea ofertas en Pipelines para ver desgloses por etapa aquí.

responseTimeChart.title: Tiempo medio de primera respuesta
responseTimeChart.description: Minutos para responder al primer mensaje no respondido, por día de la semana
responseTimeChart.noRepliesHint: Este gráfico se completa a medida que respondes a mensajes de clientes.

page.whatsappNotConnected: WhatsApp® no está conectado. Ve a Configuración para conectar tu cuenta.

messageThread.sendTemplateHint: Envía una plantilla para iniciar la conversación
messageThread.selectConversationHint: Elige una conversación de la izquierda para empezar a chatear

composer.draftHint: Toca ✨ para redactar una respuesta con IA — puedes editarla antes de enviar
composer.sessionExpiredHint: Sesión de 24h expirada. Usa una plantilla para reenganchar.
composer.readOnlyPlaceholder: Solo lectura — los visores pueden navegar pero no responder
composer.typeMessagePlaceholder: Escribe un mensaje... (Shift+Enter para nueva línea)
composer.readOnlyTitle: Solo lectura — tu rol no puede enviar mensajes
composer.quickRepliesEmpty: Sin respuestas rápidas aún. Añádelas en Configuración → Respuestas rápidas.
composer.quickReplySaveError: No se pudo guardar la respuesta rápida.

bubble.aiBadgeTitle: Enviado automáticamente por el asistente IA

templatePicker.fillPlaceholders: Completa los marcadores para renderizar esta plantilla. Meta requiere que cada variable esté configurada.
templatePicker.pickTemplate: Elige una plantilla de WhatsApp aprobada para enviar a este contacto.
templatePicker.noApprovedTemplatesHint: Aprueba una plantilla en Meta WhatsApp Manager, luego sincronízala desde Configuración → Plantillas.
templatePicker.headerValuePlaceholder: Valor para la variable del encabezado

aiBanner.pausedTitle: El asistente IA está pausado aquí
aiBanner.activeText: El asistente IA está respondiendo automáticamente
aiBanner.tookOver: Has tomado el control de este chat.
aiBanner.updateError: No se pudo actualizar el asistente IA.
aiBanner.networkError: No se pudo conectar con el servidor.

page.title: Contactos
page.subtitle: Gestiona tu lista de contactos. {count} contactos totales.
page.searchPlaceholder: Buscar por nombre, teléfono o email...

pwa.title: Instalar CodixIA
pwa.installHint: Añade esta app a tu pantalla de inicio para la mejor experiencia.
pwa.iosHint: Toca el botón de compartir y selecciona "Añadir a pantalla de inicio".

page.createToStartTracking: Create a pipeline to start tracking deals
page.defaultStagesDesc: Default stages (New Lead → Won) will be created automatically.
page.toastNotLinkedToAccount: Your profile is not linked to an account.

form.title: Title
form.toastRequired: Title, contact, and stage are required
form.toastNotLinked: Your profile is not linked to an account.

settings.deletePipelineDesc: This will archive all deals in this pipeline. This cannot be undone.
settings.toastMoveOrDeleteDeals: Move or delete deals in this stage first

analytics.totalDealsTooltip: Count of every deal in this pipeline that isn't marked as Lost. Won deals are still included.
analytics.pipelineValueTooltip: Sum of the dollar values of all deals in this pipeline, excluding deals marked as Lost.
analytics.avgDealSizeTooltip: Pipeline Value divided by Total Deals — the average value of a single non-lost deal.
analytics.weightedValueTooltip: Expected revenue: each open deal's value × its stage probability. First stage ≈ 10%, stages progress up to 90%, Won = 100%. Lost deals are excluded.
analytics.wonThisMonthTooltip: Deals marked as Won since the first day of the current month.
analytics.lostThisMonthTooltip: Deals marked as Lost since the first day of the current month.

page.title: Broadcasts
page.subtitle: Send bulk messages to your contacts using approved templates.
page.createFirst: Create your first broadcast to reach your contacts at scale.

detail.cannotDeleteSending: Cannot delete while a broadcast is actively sending

new.title: New Broadcast
new.subtitle: Create and send a broadcast message to your contacts.
new.toastGiveName: Give the broadcast a name before saving a draft.
new.toastNotLinked: Your profile is not linked to an account.

chooseTemplate.title: Choose a Template
chooseTemplate.subtitle: Select an approved message template for your broadcast.
chooseTemplate.createFirst: Create a template in Settings first.

selectAudience.title: Select Audience
selectAudience.subtitle: Choose who will receive this broadcast.
selectAudience.allDesc: Send to all {count} contacts in your database.
selectAudience.allDescLoading: Send to all contacts in your database.
selectAudience.tagDesc: Send to contacts matching specific tags.
selectAudience.customFieldDesc: Send to contacts matching a custom field rule.
selectAudience.csvDesc: Upload a CSV with phone numbers (and optional names).
selectAudience.csvFormatDesc: Must contain a 'phone' column (E.164 format). 'name' column is optional.

personalize.title: Personalize Variables
personalize.subtitle: Map your template variables to contact fields or provide static values.
personalize.headerImageDesc: This template requires a header image.

scheduleSend.title: Review & Send
scheduleSend.subtitle: Give your broadcast a name and confirm sending.

list.title: Automations
list.subtitle: Build workflows that react to WhatsApp® events automatically.
list.emptyDesc: Pick a template above or create one from scratch.
list.deleteDesc: This permanently removes {name} and its execution history. This cannot be undone.

logs.title: Execution logs
logs.emptyDesc: Trigger this automation to see runs here.

first_inbound_message.label: First Message from Contact
first_inbound_message.hint: First time this contact ever messages you (works for manually-added contacts too)

interactive_reply.label: Button / List Reply
interactive_reply.hint: Customer taps a button or list row whose id matches — chain menus across automations

new_contact_created.label: New Contact Created
new_contact_created.hint: When a contact is auto-created from an incoming message

tag_added.label: Tag Added
tag_added.hint: When a tag is added to a contact

builder.replyIdsHelp: Comma-separated button/list-row ids to match, exact. Use the same ids you set on a Send Buttons / Send List step.

config.closeConversationHint: Sets the conversation status to "closed". No configuration needed.

list.title: Flows
list.description: Build branching, button-driven WhatsApp conversations. Useful for menus, FAQs, and triage before a human steps in.
list.deleteConfirm: Delete "{name}"? Any active runs will end immediately.
list.emptyDesc: Build your first conversation — a welcome menu, an order lookup, an FAQ bot. Customers tap buttons; the bot routes them to the right answer (or the right agent).
list.createDesc: Start from a template or build from scratch.
list.triggerFirstInbound: Triggers on a contact's first-ever inbound message

logs.title: Runs
logs.description: The 50 most recent times this flow ran. Expand a row to see the engine's per-step log.
logs.emptyState: No runs yet. Trigger the flow from a personal WhatsApp number to see it appear here.
logs.noEvents: No events recorded for this run.

builder.nodesEmpty: Add a Start node, then a Send buttons node, then a Handoff — that's the welcome-menu shape from the brief.
builder.nodeKeyLabel: Node key (internal identifier — keep stable for analytics)
builder.replyIdsHint: Reply IDs for each option are shown inline above. They're returned by WhatsApp when a customer taps; you usually don't need to touch them.
builder.noNodeDesc: Select a node on the canvas to edit its configuration.

form.varKeyLabel: Variable key (stored in flow_runs.vars; alphanumeric + underscore)
form.varKeyHelp: Interpolate in downstream prompts and handoff notes with
form.internalNote: Internal note (for the agent picking up)
form.endNodeHelp: Terminal node. When the runner reaches this node the run is marked complete. No config needed.
form.buttonsHelp: Buttons (1–3) — each one routes to a different next node
form.filenameLabel: Filename shown to the customer (documents only)

send_list.label: Send list
send_list.blurb: Sends a tappable list of options

send_media.label: Send media
send_media.blurb: Sends an image, video, or document

collect_input.label: Collect input
collect_input.blurb: Asks a question, saves the reply

set_tag.label: Tag contact
set_tag.blurb: Adds or removes a contact tag

handoff.label: Handoff to agent
handoff.blurb: Hands the conversation to a human

editorState.fixIssues: Fix the issues below before activating.

Settings.pageDesc: Everything in one place — your account and your workspace. Pick a section to manage it.

members.title: Team members
members.description: People with access to this account. Roles control what each teammate can do.
members.inviteHint: The plaintext invite URL is only shown once at creation for security — to re-share, revoke the invite below and create a new one.
members.noPendingDesc: Click <bold>Invite member</bold> above to generate a shareable link.
members.removeDialogDesc: Remove <bold>{name}</bold> from the account? They'll be signed out of this account and given a fresh personal account on their next sign-in. Their login isn't deleted.

invite.inviteCreatedDesc: Share this link with your new teammate. They'll be able to sign up (or sign in) and join the account as <bold>{role}</bold>. The link is valid for <bold>{days} {days, plural, =1 {day} other {days}}</bold>.
invite.saveLinkHint: We never store the plaintext — once you close this dialog the URL is gone. To re-share, revoke this invite and create a new one.
invite.dialogDesc: Generate a one-time invite link. Share it via WhatsApp, Slack, or any channel you like — no email service required.
invite.labelHint: Helps you remember who you sent the link to in the pending list below.
invite.labelTooLong: Label must be {max} characters or fewer
invite.clipboardBlocked: Clipboard blocked — copy the link manually
invite.whatsappMessage: Join {accountName} on CodixIA using this link (valid for {expiresInDays} days): {url}

tagsAndFields.title: Fields & tags
tagsAndFields.description: Two ways to organize contacts: colour-coded tags for quick grouping, and custom fields for structured data.
tagsAndFields.tagsDesc: Colour-coded labels for grouping and filtering contacts.
tagsAndFields.fieldsDesc: Extra contact fields (e.g. ZIP code, lead source). They appear on every contact and in the “Update Contact Field” automation action.
tagsAndFields.noTags: No tags yet — create your first one below.
tagsAndFields.deleteConfirm: Delete the tag "{name}"? This removes it from all contacts and cannot be undone.

templates.title: Message templates
templates.description: Create templates and submit them to Meta for approval. Use "Sync from Meta" to pull templates approved elsewhere.
templates.syncTitle: Pull approved templates from your Meta WhatsApp Business Account
templates.createFirst: Create your first message template to get started.
templates.editTitle: Editing triggers Meta re-review — status flips to PENDING.
templates.resubmitTitle: Edit the template and resubmit to Meta for review.
templates.deleteMetaLocallyAria: Delete template from Meta and locally
templates.dialogEditDesc: Save your changes to re-submit to Meta. Status will flip back to PENDING during review.
templates.dialogNewDesc: Build a template and submit it to Meta for approval. Once approved, you can use it in broadcasts and the inbox.
templates.authWarning: AUTHENTICATION templates have a fixed body + OTP button shape that needs a different builder. Create them in Meta WhatsApp Manager for now and use <bold>Sync from Meta</bold> to bring them in.
templates.nameFixed: Name is fixed once a template exists on Meta — create a new template to change it.
templates.nameHint: Lowercase letters, digits, and underscores only.
templates.langFixed: Language is fixed once a template exists on Meta.
templates.langHint: Must match the exact code on Meta — en_US and en are distinct.
templates.headerSamplePlaceholder: Sample value for {{1}} (required for Meta review)
templates.imageHint: Upload a JPEG/PNG (≤5 MB, ≥800×418 px recommended) or paste a public HTTPS link — we upload it to Meta for review automatically.
templates.mediaHint: Must be a publicly accessible HTTPS link. Meta fetches it once during review, so it needs to stay live for ~24 hrs.
templates.bodyHint: Use {{1}}, {{2}} for variables (must be contiguous starting at {{1}}).
templates.sampleValues: Sample values (Meta uses these to review your template)
templates.buttonsLimit: Up to {max} buttons. QUICK_REPLY buttons must come before URL / phone / copy-code buttons.
templates.urlSamplePlaceholder: Example value for {{1}} (required when URL has a variable)
templates.deleteMetaDesc: "{name}" will be deleted from Meta and from CodixIA. Active broadcasts using this template will start failing on their next send. This can't be undone.
templates.deleteLocalDesc: "{name}" will be deleted from CodixIA. It was never submitted to Meta, so no remote cleanup is needed.
templates.toastSubmitEditSuccess: Edit submitted — Meta typically reviews within 24 hours.
templates.toastSubmitNewSuccess: Submitted to Meta — typical review time is 24 hours. Status updates automatically.
templates.toastSyncTruncated: Synced the first 2000 templates only — your account has more. Sync again to continue, or contact support if this persists.
templates.toastInvalidImage: Header image must be a JPEG or PNG.
templates.toastImageTooLarge: Image is {size} MB — Meta's limit is 5 MB.

roles.ownerHint: Full control over account and billing

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp connection
whatsapp.description: Connect your Meta WhatsApp Business API. Credentials, webhook, and setup steps all live here.
whatsapp.connectedDesc: Your access token authenticates with Meta. See Registration status below for whether webhooks are actually wired.
whatsapp.notConnectedDesc: Configure your Meta API credentials below to connect your WhatsApp Business account.
whatsapp.registered: Registered — Meta will deliver events to CodixIA
whatsapp.notRegistered: Not registered — Meta will not deliver events
whatsapp.subscribedSince: Subscribed since {date}. Click Verify with Meta if events stop arriving.
whatsapp.retryHint: Enter (or correct) the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to retry.
whatsapp.noRegistrationHint: This number was saved before registration tracking existed, or registration was skipped. Enter the 2-step PIN below and click Save Configuration to subscribe it.
whatsapp.apiCredentialsDesc: Enter your Meta WhatsApp Business API credentials.
whatsapp.tokenHidden: Token is hidden for security. Re-enter it to update configuration.
whatsapp.webhookVerifyTokenHint: A custom string you create. Must match the token you set in Meta webhook settings.
whatsapp.pinHint: Needed only to wire inbound messages for a production number. Set it in Meta Business Manager → WhatsApp Accounts → Phone Numbers → Two-step verification, then paste it here so CodixIA can subscribe the number — otherwise Meta routes inbound events to whichever app last claimed it (the symptom that hits second numbers under a shared WABA). Meta test numbers have no PIN and are pre-registered — leave this blank for them. Leaving it blank also keeps an existing registration untouched.
whatsapp.webhookDesc: Use this URL as your webhook callback in the Meta App Dashboard.
whatsapp.setupInstructionsDesc: Follow these steps to connect your WhatsApp Business API.
whatsapp.step1_4: Fill in app details and create
whatsapp.step2_1: In your app dashboard, click "Add Product"
whatsapp.step2_3: Follow the setup wizard to link your business
whatsapp.step3_3: Copy your WhatsApp Business Account ID
whatsapp.step3_4: Generate a Permanent Access Token from Business Settings > System Users
whatsapp.step4_3: Paste the Webhook Callback URL from above
whatsapp.step4_4: Enter the same Verify Token you set here

profile.title: Your profile
profile.description: How you show up across the app. Your avatar and name appear in the header, sidebar, and anywhere your teammates see you.
profile.photoHint: PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF. Up to 2 MB.
profile.emailChangeHint: Check the inbox for <bold>{oldEmail}</bold> and <bold>{newEmail}</bold> — both need to confirm before the change takes effect.
profile.unsupportedImageDesc: Use PNG, JPG, WebP, or GIF.
profile.profileSavedEmailCheck: Profile saved — check your email to confirm the address change
profile.passwordDesc: Use at least {min} characters. You will stay signed in on this device after changing it.
profile.cannotChangeNoEmail: Cannot change password without a current email
profile.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least {min} characters
profile.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
profile.sessionsDesc: Sign out of every device where you're logged in — including this one. Useful if you lost a laptop or shared your password.
profile.signOutConfirmDesc: Every device logged into this account will be signed out and will need to log in again. You will be redirected to the login page.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Set the mode and accent colour used across the app. Saved to this device — try it, it changes live.

push.title: Push notifications
push.description: Receive push notifications when important events happen. Requires VAPID keys configured on the server.
push.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported in this browser.
push.notConfigured: Push notifications are not configured. Ask an admin to set the VAPID keys in the server environment.
push.subscribedDesc: You will receive push notifications for events like new messages and conversation assignments.
push.unsubscribedDesc: Subscribe to receive push notifications even when the app is closed.

security.title: Login & security
security.description: Change your password and sign out of your devices. These keep your account safe.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.description: Keys authenticate the public REST API (<apiCode>/api/v1</apiCode>) so you can build your own automations. Send them as <headerCode>Authorization: Bearer <key></headerCode>.
apiKeys.createOneHint: Click <bold>New API key</bold> to create one.
apiKeys.askAdminHint: Ask an admin to create one.
apiKeys.scopesHint: A key with no scopes can still call GET /api/v1/me to verify it works.
apiKeys.copyDesc: This is the only time the full key is shown. Store it somewhere safe — if you lose it, revoke it and create a new one.
apiKeys.copyFailed: Copy failed — select and copy manually
apiKeys.newKeyDesc: Name it after the integration that will use it, and grant only the scopes it needs.

deals.title: Deals & currency
deals.description: The currency used for new deals and for pipeline and dashboard totals.
deals.defaultCurrencyDesc: New deals default to this currency, and pipeline and dashboard totals are shown in it. Existing deals keep the currency they were saved with.
deals.adminOnlyHint: Only account admins can change the default currency.

aiConfig.title: Agent setup
aiConfig.description: Bring your own OpenAI or Anthropic key. CodixIA calls the provider directly with your key — no per-seat AI fees, and your data stays yours. This powers AI-drafted replies in the inbox, the auto-reply bot, and the Playground.
aiConfig.adminOnlyConfig: Only admins and owners can change the AI configuration.
aiConfig.encryptionNotice: Your key is encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM) and never shown again after saving.
aiConfig.embeddingsHint: An OpenAI key used only to embed your knowledge base (text-embedding-3-small){sameKeyText}. Leave blank to use keyword search instead. Clear it to turn semantic search off.
aiConfig.sameKeyText: — can be the same key as above
aiConfig.behaviourDesc: Tell the assistant about your business — products, tone, what it may and may not promise. This context feeds both drafts and auto-replies.
aiConfig.promptPlaceholder: e.g. We are Acme, a coffee-equipment store. Be warm and concise. Never quote prices or delivery dates — hand off to a human for those.
aiConfig.enableAssistantDesc: Master switch. Turns on the “Draft with AI” button in the inbox.
aiConfig.autoReplyDesc: The bot answers new inbound messages automatically (only when no flow handles them and no agent is assigned). Hands off to a human when it can’t help.
aiConfig.maxAutoRepliesDesc: After this many bot replies in one thread, the bot goes quiet.
aiConfig.handoffToDesc: When the bot can’t help — or hits the reply cap — it pauses and routes the chat here, with a short note on what happened.
aiConfig.handoffQueue: Unassigned queue (any agent can pick it up)

aiKnowledge.title: Knowledge base
aiKnowledge.description: Add FAQs, policies, or product details. The assistant retrieves the relevant pieces when drafting and auto-replying, so it can answer instead of handing off.{searchType}
aiKnowledge.semanticSearchOn: Semantic search is on (embeddings key set).
aiKnowledge.keywordSearchOn: Using keyword search — add an embeddings key above for semantic search.
aiKnowledge.editDocContentPlaceholder: Paste the FAQ answer, policy text, or product details…
aiKnowledge.reindexTooltip: Re-embed all documents (e.g. after adding an embeddings key)
